checks.description: default mode renders only registry-active nodes (no H01, no roadmap labels)
checks.implementation: systemGraphBuilder filters via acceptIfAllowed and contractValidation; rejected ids surfaced as warnings

checks.description: default mode shows only primary / governance / minimal overlay edges
checks.expected_outcome: secondary and weak_observed edges hidden by default
checks.implementation: edge_classes contract carries visibility; SystemTrustGraph hides non-primary edges in normal mode unless 'show all' is toggled

checks.description: core row order is correct: AEX → PQX → EVL → TPA → CDE → SEL
checks.expected_outcome: core row slot ordering matches canonical_loop
checks.implementation: GRAPH_LAYOUTS.layered.core slots are pinned to canonical loop ordering

checks.description: full mode shows all valid registry edges
checks.implementation: showAll toggle + contract validation drops only unknown endpoints

checks.description: selected-node mode shows local upstream/downstream edges
checks.expected_outcome: edges adjacent to selected node remain visible at higher opacity
checks.implementation: connectedToFocus + selected-node opacity boost in SystemTrustGraph

checks.description: no excessive edges in default mode
checks.expected_outcome: default density ≤ ~25% of full mode density
checks.implementation: isPrimaryEdge filter retains only dependency / failure_path / focus-adjacent edges

checks.description: mobile layout sanity (no clipping at iPhone width)
checks.expected_outcome: graph wraps / scrolls; tabs do not overflow
checks.implementation: page.tsx adds overflow-x-auto on tabs and overflow-x-hidden on main; graph SVG uses w-full h-auto with viewBox

remaining_risks: Wide registry can still produce a dense full mode; mitigation is the explicit show-all toggle plus mode-specific dimming.
fix_summary: Default graph is registry-backed only; non-primary edges hidden by default; show-all toggle exposes the full registry edge set.
